item.title: Manipal Finance Corporation Ltd Gains 5.00%: Key Milestones and Market Dynamics This Week
item.description: Manipal Finance Corporation Ltd delivered a notable 5.00% gain during the week ending 24 Apr 2026, closing at Rs.23.73 compared to Rs.22.60 the previous Friday. This performance significantly outpaced the Sensex, which declined by 1.31% over the same period, closing at 35,349.66. The stock’s rally was marked by a new 52-week and all-time high on 20 Apr, reflecting strong momentum amid a broadly weakening market environment. Time: 3 minutes ago

item.title: Suraj Products Ltd Gains 0.58%: Valuation Shifts and Downgrade Shape Weekly Moves
item.description: Suraj Products Ltd closed the week with a modest gain of 0.58%, ending at Rs.234.00 on 24 April 2026, outperforming the Sensex which declined 1.31% over the same period. The week was marked by a significant downgrade from MarketsMOJO, shifting the stock’s mojo grade to Sell amid valuation and financial concerns, which influenced price volatility and investor sentiment throughout the trading sessions. Time: 3 minutes ago

item.title: H T Media Ltd Falls 6.89%: 3 Key Factors Driving the Weekly Decline
item.description: H T Media Ltd’s stock declined by 6.89% over the week ending 24 April 2026, closing at Rs.22.31 compared to Rs.23.96 the previous Friday. This underperformance contrasted with the Sensex’s more modest 1.31% fall, reflecting a challenging week marked by fluctuating technical signals, persistent fundamental weaknesses, and a downgrade in investment rating. Despite brief technical improvements early in the week, the stock faced selling pressure amid cautious investor sentiment and deteriorating financial metrics. Time: 3 minutes ago

item.title: Centum Electronics Declines 9.00% This Week: Key Factors Behind the Volatility
item.description: Centum Electronics Ltd experienced a volatile week ending 24 April 2026, with its share price declining 9.00% from Rs.3,083.75 to Rs.2,806.30, significantly underperforming the Sensex’s 1.31% fall over the same period. The week was marked by a sharp intraday reversal on 20 April after hitting a new 52-week high, followed by continued selling pressure amid broader market weakness and cautious investor sentiment. Time: 3 minutes ago

item.title: Wockhardt Ltd Gains 0.59%: Technical Shift and Earnings Drive Mixed Momentum
item.description: Wockhardt Ltd closed the week with a modest gain of 0.59%, ending at Rs.1,405.05, outperforming the Sensex which declined by 1.31% over the same period. The stock exhibited mixed momentum amid a backdrop of technical upgrades and fluctuating market conditions, with notable intraday volatility and volume shifts across the week. Time: 3 minutes ago

item.title: PC Jeweller Ltd Falls 2.19%: Volume Surges Amid Mixed Technical Signals
item.description: PC Jeweller Ltd closed the week at Rs.9.37, down 2.19% from the previous Friday’s close of Rs.9.58, underperforming the Sensex which declined 1.31% over the same period. Despite the price drop, the stock saw exceptional trading volumes throughout the week, reflecting heightened market interest amid mixed technical signals and a cautious fundamental outlook. Time: 4 minutes ago

item.title: Intellect Design Arena Ltd. Declines 0.84%: 3 Key Technical Shifts Shape Weekly Performance
item.description: Intellect Design Arena Ltd. closed the week ending 24 April 2026 at Rs.688.75, down 0.84% from the previous Friday’s close of Rs.694.60. This modest decline contrasted with the broader Sensex’s sharper 1.31% fall, signalling a relative outperformance amid a challenging market backdrop. The week was marked by a significant downgrade to a Sell rating, technical momentum shifts, and mixed financial signals that collectively shaped the stock’s price trajectory. Time: 4 minutes ago

item.title: Kolte Patil Developers Ltd Gains 3.57%: 2 Key Factors Driving the Week
item.description: Kolte Patil Developers Ltd closed the week ending 24 April 2026 with a modest gain of 3.57%, outperforming the Sensex which declined by 1.31% over the same period. The stock exhibited strong volatility early in the week, driven by a significant intraday surge on 20 April, followed by a technical momentum shift on 21 April. Despite some profit-taking and declines in the latter part of the week, Kolte Patil maintained relative strength against the broader market. Time: 4 minutes ago

item.title: Torrent Power Ltd Gains 8.56%: 7 Key Factors Driving the Week’s Momentum
item.description: Torrent Power Ltd delivered a robust weekly gain of 8.56%, closing at Rs.1,699.30 on 24 April 2026, significantly outperforming the Sensex which declined by 1.31% over the same period. The stock’s rally was marked by multiple new 52-week highs, strong derivatives market activity, and a notable upgrade followed by a cautious rating revision, reflecting a complex interplay of bullish momentum and valuation concerns. Time: 4 minutes ago

item.title: Ashirwad Capital Ltd Declines 0.71% Despite Valuation Upgrade: 2 Key Factors Behind the Week’s Moves
item.description: Ashirwad Capital Ltd’s stock closed the week at Rs.2.80, down 0.71% from Rs.2.82 last Friday, while the Sensex declined 1.31% over the same period. Despite the modest price dip, the company saw a notable upgrade in its valuation attractiveness and investment rating, reflecting a complex interplay of improved price metrics amid persistent fundamental challenges. This review analyses the key events and price movements shaping the stock’s performance during the week ending 24 April 2026. Time: 4 minutes ago

item.title: Bimetal Bearings Ltd Falls 3.51%: 2 Key Events Shaping the Week
item.description: Bimetal Bearings Ltd experienced a volatile week, closing at Rs.561.10 on 24 Apr 2026, down 3.51% from the previous Friday’s close of Rs.581.50. This decline contrasted with the broader Sensex, which fell 1.31% over the same period, indicating relative underperformance. The week was marked by a sharp rebound to a 52-week high midweek, followed by a sustained sell-off, reflecting mixed financial signals and technical uncertainty. Time: 4 minutes ago

item.title: Indo Cotspin Gains 12.27%: 3 Key Factors Driving the Week’s Rally
item.description: Indo Cotspin Ltd delivered a strong weekly performance, rising 12.27% from Rs.31.45 to Rs.35.31 between 20 and 24 April 2026, significantly outperforming the Sensex which declined 1.31% over the same period. The stock’s rally was supported by an upgrade in technical ratings, a series of new 52-week highs, and sustained buying momentum despite a challenging broader market environment. Time: 4 minutes ago

item.title: C J Gelatine Products Ltd Falls 12.53%: 3 Key Factors Driving the Decline
item.description: C J Gelatine Products Ltd experienced a challenging week from 20 to 24 April 2026, with its share price declining sharply by 12.53% to close at Rs.15.36, significantly underperforming the Sensex which fell by 1.31% over the same period. The week was marked by a series of rating changes and valuation shifts, reflecting mixed investor sentiment amid persistent financial and technical concerns. Time: 4 minutes ago

item.title: Sudal Industries Gains 12.11%: Valuation Shift and Mixed Signals Shape the Week
item.description: Sudal Industries Ltd delivered a strong weekly gain of 12.11%, closing at Rs.58.80 on 24 April 2026, significantly outperforming the Sensex which declined 1.31% over the same period. The week was marked by a notable downgrade to a Strong Sell rating amid mixed financial and technical signals, alongside an upgrade in valuation attractiveness. These contrasting developments contributed to volatile price action and investor caution throughout the week. Time: 4 minutes ago

item.title: Unichem Laboratories Gains 6.18%: 3 Key Factors Driving the Week’s Rally
item.description: Unichem Laboratories Ltd delivered a strong weekly performance, rising 6.18% from Rs.350.85 to Rs.372.55 between 20 and 24 April 2026, significantly outperforming the Sensex which declined 1.31% over the same period. The stock’s rally was driven by robust intraday gains on 22 and 23 April, coupled with a favourable valuation shift announced on 24 April, reflecting renewed investor interest amid a challenging broader market environment. Time: 4 minutes ago
